CustomField.description: Use with field "Disaster or Emergency Notes". If your program is providing service in response to a national or other disaster/emergency, indicate here. Tip: Discuss how your program defines service related to a disaster/emergency, then update this help text or add picklist options for specific events.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If your program is providing service in response to a national or other disaster/emergency, indicate here. Tip: Discuss how your program defines service related to a disaster/emergency, then update this help text or add picklist options for specific event
CustomField.label: Disaster or Emergency
